mgr.prx: sceMgr_driver

This page contains the status of all the NIDs from the sceMgr_driver library inside the mgr.prx module.
Hover a cell to know the meaning of the color.
"..." means the given name is the same as the one on its left.

NID1.001.031.501.511.522.002.012.502.602.702.712.802.812.823.003.013.023.033.103.113.303.403.503.513.523.603.703.713.723.733.803.903.933.953.964.004.014.054.204.215.005.015.025.035.055.505.515.555.706.006.106.206.306.316.356.366.376.386.396.606.61
